title: Fixed Price House & Land Package – Narangba
shortDesc: Stunning 4-bed family home on 300m² in the sought-after Narangba Heights Estate. Modern open-plan design with quality inclusions throughout.
description:
Discover the perfect blend of style, comfort, and convenience with this stunning home in the sought-after Narangba Heights Estate. Positioned on a 300m² block, this beautifully designed residence offers a spacious 180.6m² floor plan ideal for growing families or savvy investors.

Featuring 4 generous bedrooms, 2 modern bathrooms, and a double garage, this home has been thoughtfully designed to maximise both space and functionality. The open-plan living and dining areas flow seamlessly, creating the perfect environment for entertaining or relaxing with family.

Enjoy a contemporary kitchen with quality finishes, well-appointed bedrooms, and a master suite complete with ensuite. Located in a thriving community close to schools, parks, shopping centres, and transport links.

title: House & Land Package – 4 Bed | 2 Bath | 2 Car – Rochedale
shortDesc: Modern living in the heart of Rochedale — designer kitchen with stone benchtops, alfresco entertaining, fully landscaped turnkey finish.
description:
Discover modern living in the heart of Rochedale, one of Brisbane's most sought-after suburbs.

4 spacious bedrooms including master with ensuite and walk-in robe, 2 modern bathrooms with high-quality finishes, double lock-up garage, open-plan living and dining area, designer kitchen with stone benchtops and stainless steel appliances, outdoor alfresco entertaining area, and fully landscaped turnkey finish.

Easy access to major motorways (M1 & Gateway), close to quality schools, parks, and shopping centres. Only 20 minutes to Brisbane CBD.

title: Fixed Price House & Land Package – Deebing Heights
shortDesc: 7-Star energy rated 4-bed home on 392m² in Deebing Heights. Full turnkey — exposed aggregate driveway, landscaping, fencing, and QBCC warranty included.
description:
Modern family living meets smart investing in this beautifully designed 180m² home on a generous 392m² block in the sought-after Deebing Heights community.

Whether you're a growing family or savvy investor, this complete fixed-price package offers style, comfort, and outstanding value — with nothing more to spend.

Highlights include: 4 spacious bedrooms (master with WIR & ensuite), open-plan living & dining, designer kitchen with stone benchtops, stainless steel appliances, 7-star energy efficiency rating, Colorbond® steel roof, air-conditioning to living & master bedroom, double lock-up garage with remote access, and covered alfresco with integrated concrete slab.

Rental Estimate: $670–$700 per week. Estimated Rental Yield: 3.82%.

title: Modern House & Land Package – Burpengary
shortDesc: Premium 4-bedroom home on a generous 403m² block in Burpengary. Spacious master suite with WIR, alfresco entertaining, energy-efficient design.
description:
Discover the perfect blend of style, comfort, and convenience with this beautifully designed 4-bedroom, 2-bathroom, 2-car home and land package. Thoughtfully crafted for growing families, first-home buyers, or savvy investors, this home offers premium inclusions and contemporary finishes throughout.

Spacious master suite with walk-in wardrobe and private ensuite, three additional bedrooms with built-in robes, open-plan living and dining flowing to an outdoor alfresco area, designer kitchen with stone benchtops and stainless-steel appliances, modern family bathroom with full-size bath, double garage with internal access, and energy-efficient design including insulation and LED lighting.

Perfectly positioned close to schools, shops, transport, parks, and upcoming community facilities.

title: House & Land Package – 4 Bed | 2 Bath | 2 Car – Morayfield
shortDesc: Designer inclusions promotion — Caesarstone benchtops, European kitchen appliances, exposed aggregate driveway, NBN package. Fixed price site costs.
description: Premium House & Land Package inclusions: Fixed price site costs, steel frame and steel roof, carpet and tiling, stained 1200mm wide timber feature front entry door, Caesarstone benchtops to kitchen, bathroom and ensuite, European designed stainless steel kitchen appliances, wall mounted bathroom tapwear, soft close doors and drawers, mirror sliding doors to robes, NBN Package, integrated slab to outdoor living area and porch, exposed aggregate driveway, clothesline & letterbox.

title: House & Land Package – 4 Bed | 2.5 Bath | 2 Car – Jimboomba
shortDesc: Spacious 4-bed home on a large 605m² block in Jimboomba. Ducted multi-zone air conditioning, Caesarstone benchtops, 900mm European kitchen appliances.
description: Premium House & Land Package inclusions: Fixed price site costs, steel frame and sheet roof, stained 1200mm wide timber feature front entry door, carpet and tiling, Caesarstone benchtops to kitchen, bathroom and ensuite, ducted multi-zone air conditioning, wall mounted bathroom tapware, 900mm European designed stainless steel kitchen appliances, integrated tiled slab to outdoor living area and porch, NBN Package, exposed aggregate driveway, clothesline & letterbox.

title: House & Land Package – Pearsall | 4 Bed, 2 Bath, 2-Car Garage
shortDesc: Stylish 4-bed family home in the growing suburb of Pearsall WA. Close to Joondalup, beaches, local shops, and cafes. Generous 575m² block.
description:
Step into modern family living with this stylish 4-bedroom, 2-bathroom house and land package in the growing suburb of Pearsall. Perfect for families seeking comfort, space, and convenience in a welcoming community.

Contemporary finishes and functional layouts, ideal for growing families or investors. Enjoy the lifestyle of Pearsall with easy access to local parks and recreational facilities, proximity to Joondalup and nearby beaches, and a family-friendly community with local shops and cafes.

title: Brand New 4+2+2 House & Land Package – Upper Coomera
shortDesc: Brand new 4-bed double garage home in Upper Coomera. Stone benchtops, walk-in pantry, alfresco area. Close to schools, shops, parks, and transport.
description:
Discover modern family living in this stunning 4-bedroom, 2-bathroom, double garage home — designed for comfort, style, and convenience.

4 spacious bedrooms with built-in robes (master with walk-in & ensuite), 2 designer bathrooms with quality fittings and finishes, open-plan living & dining flowing onto an alfresco entertaining area, modern kitchen with stone benchtops, stainless steel appliances & walk-in pantry, double lock-up garage with internal access.

Perfectly located close to schools, shops, parks, and public transport. Ideal for first-home buyers, investors, or growing families.

title: Dual Key Package – Woodgate
shortDesc: Exceptional dual-key investment in Woodgate — two fully self-contained residences on 930m². Full turnkey, solar, stone benchtops, alfresco, 1.8kW solar.
description:
Dual Key Woodgate presents an exceptional opportunity for investors, multigenerational families, or those seeking flexible living arrangements in the serene coastal community of Woodgate. Featuring two fully self-contained residences under one roof, this modern dual-key design offers privacy, independence, and strong rental potential.

Each residence includes its own private entry, contemporary kitchen, spacious living areas, and outdoor retreat. Premium inclusions: full turnkey finish, fully fenced, turfed & landscaped, 2550mm high ceilings, Colorbond roof, reverse cycle/split system air-conditioner, 20mm manufactured stone kitchen benchtop, approximately 1.8kW solar power system, 600mm stainless steel kitchen appliances, roller blinds throughout, ceiling fans to bedrooms, undercover tiled alfresco area.

Just moments from pristine beaches, cafés, and local amenities.

title: Development Opportunity – 1,482m² Dual Title Block
shortDesc: Rare 1,482m² block on two separate titles in a quiet Slacks Creek cul-de-sac. Self-contained lower level, wide side access, and endless development potential.
description:
Set on a rare and expansive 1,482sqm block already divided into two separate titles, 1–3 Rowan Street in Slacks Creek presents an exceptional opportunity for families, multi-generational living, investors, or developers seeking space, versatility, and long-term potential.

The upper level features bright, airy interiors with spacious living flowing to a large timber deck and three generously sized bedrooms. Downstairs is a fully renovated, self-contained living zone with two additional bedrooms, a sleek modern bathroom, stylish tiled living spaces, and a fully equipped kitchenette.

The enormous block invites endless possibilities — build on the second title, add another dwelling, or develop further. Wide side access for caravan, boat, or trailer. Just minutes from local schools, shopping centres, transport options, and the M1.
